'''Spindrift''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Spindrift system/Legends|Spindrift system]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Rseik sector/Legends|Rseik sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> An isolated world, Spindrift was home to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] outpost called [[Spindrift Station]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Spindrift Station was attacked by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Flying Bantha Squadron|squadron]] flying repurposed [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE starfighters]], who [[Skirmish on Spindrift|captured]] the station in order to obtain route coordinates for an Imperial armada<ref name="marvel60" /> carrying a unique creature called a [[teezl]].<ref name="cswe">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Spindrift appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' 60]], written by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel60" />
